results.title: ADA
results.author: Exa
results.text:
# ADA (AXIATA DIGITAL & ANALYTICS SDN BHD)

ADA is a Business Consulting and Services company. The Dissonant is a creative agency that brings concepts to life, transforming them into brands, campaigns, and experiences that don’t just exist but resonate. They create the work they want to see, feel, and experience themselves. ADA employs 884 people (+5.7% YoY, +105 people) and has an annual revenue of $234.6M, founded in 2018. Headquartered in Singapore, operates in 31 countries (including India, Malaysia, Indonesia, Philippines, and Vietnam). Has $138.0M in total funding, most recently a Corporate Round in November 2023, with 3 prior funding rounds.

## About
We are The Data and AI Experience Company. 

We work with global leaders to create data and AI-powered digital experiences where every touchpoint earns trust, every moment feels personal, every interaction creates value, and every decision runs on real-time intelligence, so enterprises can scale, stay ahead, and deliver measurable outcomes. 

Our mission is to create the world’s most intelligent growth platform, for every client we serve. 

ADA HQ
ADA Data AI Solutions Sdn Bhd 201401043754 (1119936-M)

ADA MY
ADA Data AI Commerce Solutions Sdn Bhd 200801019804 (821115-M)

results.summary:
adaglobal.com is the online platform of ADA (Axiata Digital & Analytics SDN BHD), a global leader in data and AI-powered digital experiences. The company specializes in business consulting and services, focusing on creating innovative data-driven solutions, digital campaigns, and brand experiences. Their core offerings include developing real-time intelligent platforms that enhance customer trust, personalization, and measurable outcomes for enterprises.

ADA operates as a private, high-growth company founded in 2018, with a presence in 31 countries across Asia. It employs approximately 884 staff and generates annual revenues of around USD 234.6 million. The company's business model revolves around providing data analytics, AI solutions, and digital transformation services to large enterprises and global brands, helping them scale and stay competitive through innovative digital experiences.

Target customers primarily include large corporations and organizations seeking advanced data and AI solutions to improve customer engagement, operational efficiency, and decision-making. ADA’s revenue streams come from consulting services, digital platform solutions, and strategic partnerships, supported by substantial funding rounds totaling USD 138 million, including recent investments led by Mitsui & Co and SoftBank.

Overall, ADA is in an advanced growth stage, continuously expanding through acquisitions and global operations, with a focus on delivering measurable digital transformation outcomes for its clients.

results.title: Identity & Authentication Solutions - ADA Global
results.text: Verify real users, reduce fraud, and remove friction. Carrier-grade signals and multichannel verification delivered through a single API.
results.summary: ADA Global offers identity and authentication solutions designed to verify real users, reduce fraud, and streamline user experiences. Their product provides carrier-grade signals and multichannel verification via a single API, enabling businesses to authenticate users efficiently across various channels. The company's business model centers on providing API-based verification services to clients seeking secure, frictionless user authentication. Target customers likely include financial institutions, e-commerce platforms, and other digital service providers that require robust identity verification. Revenue is generated through API usage fees or subscription-based models. While specific details about their company stage are not provided, their focus on scalable, carrier-grade solutions suggests they are an established player in the identity verification industry, possibly in growth or expansion phase.

results.title: Amperity is the AI-Powered Customer Data Cloud | Amperity
results.text:
Amperity is the AI-Powered Customer Data Cloud | Amperity

Join us at Amplify, our flagship customer data event for executives, on May 6th in New York City.

# Get a return on customer data

Amperity is an agent-powered customer data cloud that builds trusted profiles, reveals what lifts revenue, and fuels real-time actions across every channel.

Contact Sales Explore the platform

Amperity may record a transcript of this chat. For more information, please see our Privacy Notice.

- How does Amperity make customer data more accurate and useful?
- How does Amperity’s Identity Resolution work?
- What integrations does Amperity support?
- How does Amperity help me know my customers?
- What problems does Amperity solve for brands?
- What business outcomes can Amperity deliver?

Powering richer customer relationships for leading brands

## Understanding customers has never been easier

#### Less coding, better data

Remove the custom code required to prepare data and resolve customer identities. Build the most accurate profiles with AI you can control.

#### Your data, your way

Tailor Amperity to fit your existing architecture. Start with out-of-the-box models, then customize to fit any data schema or destination.

#### Fewer asks, greater action

Prevent data bottlenecks. Give business user self-service options to explore data and drive customer engagement.

## Customer Data Cloud is AI that drives ROI

Save time resolving identities

Find hidden connections in online and offline PII data with AI. Create an identity keychain that links customer profiles without losing context.

Build an accurate Customer 360, faster

Enable data self-service

Quickly send data anywhere

“Loyalty conversion increased 3X after using Amperity’s customer data cloud to merge 6 million loyalty members from two brands into one."

Melissa Caplis Senior Product Manager of Data, Alaska Airlines

Built on your Data Lakehouse

## Share data with Amperity without copying data or complicated ETLs

Set up direct data sharing between Amperity and Lakehouses like Databricks and Snowflake in just minutes. Or bring your own storage to keep data on your infrastructure.

Data sharing

Customer stories

## Real outcomes, proven across industries

HotelsRetailAirlinesFinancial Services

### Customer Story: Wyndham

See how Wyndham used Amperity to unify customer profiles and enhance their global marketing capabilities.

Learn more

### Customer Story: Brooks Running

Brooks Running has always been focused on the runner. Here's how they're winning the race towards customer-centricity.

Learn more

### Customer Story: Virgin Atlantic

With zero-copy data sharing between Amperity and Databricks, Virgin Atlantic enabled technical users to easily make data-driven decisions and drive exceptional travel experiences.

Learn more

### Customer Story: BECU

BECU partnered with Amperity, transforming data silos to real-time member personalization.

Learn more

## The safety of your data is our top priority

The security, integrity, and accessibility of your data is essential. We make sure to always adhere to the latest security standards, including SOC 2, GDPR, HIPAA, and more.

Security & compliance

Get in touch

## Put the power of Amperity to work for you

Contact Sales Watch demo

One smart API taps 5 billion identity records and routes every user to the best data, document, or biometric check in real time — so you approve more good customers and cut fraud faster than any single-provider solution.

Explore VX

See Demo

results.title: Simon AI | Agentic Marketing Platform with the AI-First CDP
results.author: Kristen ElmerSr. Director of eCommerce Sales, BARK
results.text:
Simon AI | Agentic Marketing Platform with the AI-First CDP

# Launch campaigns that adapt to real-world customer context

Simon AI orchestrates 1:1 personalization by combining customer data with inventory, weather, local events, and trends. AI agents handle data and execution with moment-aware timing so teams launch fast.

Talk to us

Explore Simon AI

Positive TikTok review

Repeat purchase streak

Low stock: only two left

Competitor price drop

Valentine’s Day

Frustration in support chat

Browsing spike

Abandoned cart

Rainy day

The AI-first composable customer data platform for the fastest-growing brands and Fortune 500 leaders

## Explore the Simon AI™Agentic Marketing Platform

Personalization Studio

Simon AI Agents

Composable CDP

### Simon AI Personalization Studio

Set a goal, create a Blueprint that guides agents, and scale adaptive micro-campaigns to reach new audiences with fresh relevance. Deliver high-performing personalization with marketing-ready AI Fields and AI Moments that adapt continuously to new customer signals.

Personalization Studio

### Simon AI Agents

Your data and execution team, built for speed. Agents surface signals, prepare data, and automate orchestration so marketers launch more campaigns faster and convert at scale.

AI Agents

### Simon AI Composable CDP

The AI-first CDP that runs in your cloud with advanced identity resolution, audience matching, and predictive insights. Unlock 100× more customer and contextual data with zero data movement to power personalization everywhere, on live data.

Composable CDP

100x Actionable Data

Higher Conversion

No More Bottlenecks

01.

### Activate the full universe of signals

Market with 1st, 2nd, and 3rd-party structured and unstructured data, with zero ETL, to unlock mass personalization that performs.

How it works

Enthusiasm in support chat

Retail media engagement

95%

Rhonda Johnsons

rhonda.johnsons@email.com

Emails clicks last 7 days

Running shoes

In market for

02.

### Personalize with context from live, real-world signals

Weather shifts, sentiment spikes, social reviews, and cultural events instantly become marketing opportunities.

How it works

03.

### Launch campaigns 10× faster

Goal-based workflows and Composable AI Agents handle prep, insights, and execution, multiplying throughput while removing bottlenecks.

How it works

04.

### Optimize continuously toward your goals

Blueprints and Adaptive Segments learn and adjust in real time, compounding ROI for every campaign.

How it works

ROI

+890%

## Whatever Your Goal, Simon AI Delivers the Outcome

### Prevent Churn Before It Happens

AI Fields capture churn risk from sentiment and usage data. Trigger retention campaigns that reduce churn and grow LTV.

### Trigger Contextual Offers That Convert

Moments created by Insight Agents turn real-world signals like weather and trends into triggers for higher-converting campaigns.

### Grow Loyalty and Lifetime Value

Adaptive Segments evolve with customer behavior. Personalize rewards, upsells, and cross-sells that expand revenue per customer.

### Launch Contextual Personalization 10× Faster

Blueprints and Automation Agents handle execution based on your goals, so you activate more campaigns without engineering bottlenecks.

### Adapt Journeys in Real Time

AI Fields, Moments, and Adaptive Segments update continuously, ensuring every campaign stays relevant to live customer behavior and context.

### Shift Data Team Work to Higher-Value Tasks

AI Agents handle insights and data prep, freeing data teams to focus on improving AI performance and enhancing personalization accuracy and scale.

## Learn more about Agentic Marketing

Blog

### How AI Personas and Affinity Agents find who will care about your next launch

results.title: AI-Powered Identity Verification | Drive Growth - Veriff
results.text:
AI-Powered Identity Verification | Drive Growth - Veriff

# Trust starts with the global leader in identity verification

Veriff verifies identities by analyzing 1,000+ signals per session, stopping fraud while enabling global digital growth

Book a demo Try for free

Your browser does not support the video tag.

## Trust without compromise

Protect your organization while accelerating growth. Secure users without killing conversion, and meet every compliance standard with speed and accuracy.

Book a demo

### Vertically integrated technology

Highest automated accuracy from a proprietary, integrated stack with decisions based on 1,000+ signals per session.

### Becoming the source of truth

A growing data moat and cross-session intelligence helps identify trusted vs. risky users and enables industry-wide cooperation.

### Price & performance at scale

Modern fraud demands performance. Global coverage and automation deliver scalable pricing without manual overhead.

## Performance at scale

230+

Countries and territories covered

99.9%

Accuracy rate

6s

Fast decision times

13.5K+

Government documents covered

## AI-powered architecture, built for trust

### Identity Verification

AI-powered identity and document checks to confirm users worldwide, supporting millions of IDs while reducing fraud, compliance risk, and onboarding friction.

Identity & Document Verification Database Verification Proof of Address Age Validation AML Screening

### Biometric Verification

Facial biometrics and passive liveness detect users in seconds, matching them to IDs or templates for secure, frictionless authentication.

Age Estimation Biometric Authentication

### Fraud Prevention

Machine learning and behavioral signals detect impersonation and anomalies in real time, stopping fraud while validating real customers.

Fraud Protect Fraud Intelligence

### Know Your Business

Validate businesses worldwide with access to global registries and corporate records, reducing fraud, ensuring compliance, and streamlining onboarding at scale.

Business Verification Database Verification AML Screening

Reduce Fraud Ship fast Boost Conversion Ensure Compliance

Reduce Fraud

### Neutralize threats before they scale

Give your business an intelligent shield that is continuously learning. Learns fast so you can grow faster. With document forensics, liveness cues, and behavioral signals built into your workflow, you can instantly block deepfakes and coordinated attacks in real-time.

Ship fast

### Integration without friction

With clean APIs, pre-built SDKs, and comprehensive documentation for seamless integration, your team gets a smooth path from sandbox to production. Plus, we’re here to support you every step of the way.

Boost Conversion

### Turn barriers into bridges

Transform identity verification into a seamless user experience—with automated, real-time feedback loops high-intent customers are guided through the process in seconds, not minutes.

Ensure Compliance

### Global standards. Local assurance.

By automating KYC and AML checks across 230+ countries, we simplify global regulatory hurdles so you can stay audit-ready and compliant without adding manual overhead or slowing your momentum.

## Global reach for local compliance

Scale with confidence with a platform that respects local compliance and risk requirements in 230+ countries and territories, 48+ languages, and across all major regulatory frameworks.

Click on a country to see the supported documents

Paul Nunn, Chief Strategy Officer & Head of Developer Relations,KWS

"Our partnership with Veriff helps us to effectively manage ID Scan verification globally, and at a very large concurrent scale. It is incredibly important that we work with best-in-class technology partners to deliver these services to Kids Web Services."

Read case study

Juan Esteban Saldarriaga, Founder and CEO,Juancho Te Presta

"Our fraud levels have dropped to below 1%, which is very impressive. This is thanks to the use of Veriff’s background video recording feature, which helps us understand more about what else might be going on during a customer verification."

Read case study

Andy Wrigh

results.title: Leading AI-Powered Identity Verification Platform | Jumio
results.author: Head of Customer Support
results.text:
Leading AI-Powered Identity Verification Platform | Jumio

Identity isn’t a single moment.

This is identity that thinks.

This is identity intelligence.

Jumio Smart.

Watch Video

Leading Brands Choose Jumio

Go beyond point-in-time identity verification checks.

Jumio delivers continuous, contextual, and intelligent identity insights throughout the customer lifecycle. Tap into the Jumio Identity Graph to proactively stop sophisticated fraud, ensure compliance, and build trusted relationships.

See How Jumio Works

120

Transactions Processed Per Second

Faster than a lightning strike — so you can handle traffic surges with confidence.

Millions

Tens of Millions of Known Identities in the Jumio Identity Graph

Access intelligence others can’t see, enabling faster verification and more assurance.

5K+

Supported Global ID Types

Real global coverage, not just regional patchwork.

300+

Patents & Patent Applications

Proven innovation and reliability driven by automated proprietary technology.

1B+

Transactions Processed

Machine learning trained on billions of data points for unmatched fraud detection.

Hundreds

of Best-in-Class Global Data Sources

One connection to leading identity data sources.

### Industry-leading AI-driven Technology

#### The Jumio Identity Graph

The Jumio Identity Graph

Jumio’s network of 30M+ identities reveals patterns others can’t see. With consent to use data from both legitimate users and known fraudsters, we deliver a unique, holistic view of identity, powering faster decisions and stopping fraud before it strikes.

#### Biometrics

Biometrics

Industry-leading biometric technology and liveness detection stops more deepfakes and other advanced spoofing attacks. Performing automated checks for 1:1 face match, age estimation, sleeping person, multiple people, face morphing, and more.

#### Identity Intelligence

Identity Intelligence

Jumio moves beyond point-in-time verification to deliver a real-time, continuous view of identity. By connecting various signals across events, time, and customers through the Jumio Identity Graph, our platform uncovers emerging risks, reinforces trust, and powers faster, smarter decisions on identity trust.

Explore Technology

### End-to-end Identity Intelligence

- AML Screening
- Cross-Transaction Risk
- Risk Signals
- Identity Verification
- Get Started

Identity Verification

- AML Screening
- Cross-Transaction Risk
- Risk Signals
- Identity Verification

## Identity Verification

Build instant trust and stay compliant with multi-layered, AI-powered identity verification. Using proprietary technology, catch fraud with precision and receive real-time results without slowing down low-risk users.

Learn More

## Risk Signals

Quickly assess customer risk with additional data intelligence from hundreds of global sources. Enabling faster, more secure automated decisions throughout the customer lifecycle.

Learn More

## Cross-Transaction Risk

Determine user reputation with pre-vetted identity profiles across the Jumio Identity Graph. Accelerate onboarding by recognizing trusted users and blocking repeat fraudsters.

Learn More

## AML Screening

AI-powered AML screening and monitoring against global and regional sanctions, politically exposed persons (PEP) lists and adverse media. Essential for financial institutions, gaming operators, and other regulated businesses required to comply with anti-money laundering regulations.

Learn More

Built on the Jumio Platform, leveraging biometrics, AI, and the latest technologies.

Learn More

- Identity Analytics
- Rules Engine
- Orchestration

Read Case Study

Since launch, Personal Pay has experienced sustained growth, which has even gone through stages with exponential peaks. With Jumio, we have been able to successfully process the data of onboarded people, allowing the business to scale with a frictionless experience.”

Read Case Study

Travel

We selected Jumio as the solution that best provides our guests with a seamless travel experience. Through this partnership, guests can verify their travel documents directly in their Alaska Airlines app, saving time in the airport lobby and at their gate.”

Read Case Study

results.title: AI Identity Resolution for Customer Data Accuracy | Amperity
results.text:
AI Identity Resolution for Customer Data Accuracy | Amperity

# Contextual Identity. Built for AI. Trusted by Humans.

Build accurate, scalable, and privacy-safe profiles using patented AI for identity resolution.

Request demo Download product brief

## Why Identity Resolution matters

#### Connect every touchpoint to one customer profile

Link fragmented IDs across every channel so you recognize customers everywhere they shop. Stop sending duplicate emails to your regulars.

#### Find your hidden high-value customers

Consolidate fragmented profiles to reveal true lifetime value. Give your biggest spenders the VIP treatment they've earned.

#### Stop duplicate marketing spend

Cut duplicate emails, redundant ads, and wasted catalog sends. When you merge duplicate profiles, every marketing dollar reaches a real person.

#### Maintain customer trust and privacy

Link consent decisions across channels to the right customer profile every time. When Jane Smith becomes J. Smith, her opt-out preferences follow her. Avoid regulatory fines and maintain customer trust through unified consent tracking.

## AI-powered identity resolution

Build unified profiles in hours, not months

There are three approaches to identity resolution. Manual SQL matching requires data engineering teams and breaks constantly. Deterministic rule-based tools deliver high precision but miss 40%+ of matches. Amperity's AI/ML approach combines deterministic confidence with probabilistic discovery, capturing what others miss.

Watch demo

Flexible identity matching: run multiple identity graphs

Run multiple identity graphs simultaneously: Growth Graph (probabilistic) maximizes reach, Trust Graph (deterministic) ensures compliance, Opportunity Graph measures the gap between proven and probable matches.

## Increase data confidence

Configurable match and merge rules

Improve profile accuracy with out-of-the-box merge and unmerge rules that can be customized for each use case or database.

Customizable householding

Unpack complex relationships with out-of-the-box physical or digital rules to understand the unique ways groups of people purchase together.

Watch the webinar

Full transparency and benchmarking

Build trust in your data with complete visibility into how every connection was made, with benchmarking tools to QA and tune the model for your business.

## Stay flexible to new data

Lakehouse native

Instantly share data to Amperity and make your identity graph available back in your data lakehouse with Amperity Bridge.

Amperity Bridge

Built-in parallel Sandboxes

Patented Sandbox feature allows users to test and incorporate new data without disrupting existing models, eliminating months-long integration cycles.

Workflow monitoring and alerting

Robust data governance and workflow tools allow you to monitor and maintain with ease.

Customer Data Cloud

### AI-powered solutions to unlock the full potential of customer data

Today’s data challenges require AI solutions. Amperity helps technologists rapidly transform raw customer data in a data warehouse into actionable business assets.

Customer Data Cloud

"We almost couldn't believe it — the time that it took us to deduplicate information compared to what Amperity did. And they deduplicated 3x what we had been able to do on our own."

Tony Marshall VP of Analytics, Business Intelligence and Data Science DICK’s Sporting Goods

Get in touch

## Ready to see Amperity in action?

Watch demo Contact Sales

results.title: ADA Unveils AI CoPilots to Revolutionise Marketing and Commerce for Global Enterprises - ADA
results.author: Kate
results.text:
ADA Unveils AI CoPilots to Revolutionise Marketing and Commerce for Global Enterprises - ADA

Date: 26 Feb 2026

Post

News

# ADA Unveils AI CoPilots to Revolutionise Marketing and Commerce for Global Enterprises

ADA unveils AI CoPilots to transform enterprise marketing & commerce, enhancing efficiency, agility, and AI-driven decision-making for businesses.

Share

Copy link Facebook X LinkedIn Instagram

[Singapore, 26 April 2024] – ADA, a leader in digital and data-driven business transformation across Asia, today launched a visionary suite of AI CoPilots engineered to redefine enterprise marketing and commerce functions, driving efficiency and effectiveness, fostering a new era of strategic and operational agility through data and AI democratisation.

Seamlessly integrated with ADA’s suite of digital services, AI CoPilots tap into diverse datasets and proprietary AI models. Each CoPilot unites disparate information streams, dismantling the silos between different platforms and business units. By doing so, it provides transformative insights with real-time predictive analytics and delivers strategic guidance customised for the unique dynamics of each enterprise.

ADA’s inaugural lineup of AI CoPilots encompasses four strategically devised tools, each tailored to optimise distinct facets of digital enterprise:

- CoPilot for Customer Segmentation: Enables clients to rapidly access and leverage ADA’s XACT data segments, transforming their marketing with compliant, actionable insights from over 300 million profiles.
- CoPilot for Conversational AI: Empowers chatbots with the ability to engage in deep, meaningful dialogues and provide human-like responses, swiftly resolving queries with a clear focus on outcomes.
- CoPilot for Ecommerce: Offers advanced predictive capabilities for ecommerce platforms to anticipate market trends and consumer behaviour, powering a competitive advantage for clients.
- CoPilot for Full Funnel Marketing: Rapidly synthesises diverse datasets, offering businesses actionable insights to identify high-value users and refine campaigns across the funnel, enabling data-driven decisions as quickly as tomorrow.

“Our new AI CoPilots will set a benchmark in the industry by enabling enterprises to execute unprecedented marketing and commerce strategies,” said Srinivas Gattamneni, CEO at ADA. “This initiative is not just an investment in technology, it’s an investment in our customers’ future, providing them with the tools they need to thrive in a competitive market. This move not only amplifies the reach of ADA’s advanced machine learning models and AI technologies but also reinforces the company’s dedication to fostering a synergistic ecosystem where our client’s strategies are seamlessly executed from insight to action.”

ADA’s commitment to innovation and its expansive presence in 12 countries underscore its role as a transformative force in the industry. As ADA continues to expand its capabilities and reach, it remains dedicated to delivering cutting-edge solutions that drive business success.

‍

-End of the Release-

‍

About ADA

ADA leverages data, artificial intelligence, and technology to transform businesses across Asia. With a robust presence in 12 countries, ADA combines the best of AI and analytics to provide comprehensive digital solutions that drive business performance.

The company has a multi-faceted, data-driven approach that encompasses:

Data Transformation Services

Marketing Solutions

Ecommerce Solutions

Customer Engagement Solutions

The company’s dual headquarters are in Singapore and Malaysia. Notably, ADA’s shareholders include industry giants like Softbank, Axiata, Mitsui, and Sumitomo Corporation.

For more information about ADA and its new AI CoPilots, please visit www.adaglobal.com or contact the ADA team.

Contact:

Klara Grintal

Chief Marketing Officer

klara.grintal@adaglobal.com

‍

Cookie Settings

Seamlessly integrated with ADA’s suite of digital services, AI CoPilots tap into diverse datasets and proprietary AI models. Each CoPilot unites disparate information streams, dismantling the silos between different platforms and business units. By doing so, it provides transformative insights with real-time predictive analytics and delivers  ... This move not only amplifies the reach of ADA’s advanced machine learning models and AI  ...    strategies are seamlessly executed from insight to action.” ADA’s commitment to innovation and its expansive presence in 12 countries underscore its role as a transformative force in the industry. As ADA continues to expand its capabilities and reach, it remains dedicated to delivering cutting-edge solutions that drive business success. ‍

With a robust presence in 12 countries, ADA combines the best of AI and analytics to provide comprehensive digital solutions that drive business performance. The company has a multi-faceted, data-driven approach that encompasses:

Data Transformation Services Marketing Solutions

results.title: ADA and Opptra partner to bring Hasbro and other ...
results.author: ADA
results.text:
ADA and Opptra partner to bring Hasbro and other powerhouse global consumer brands to Asia's ecommerce market Accessibility Statement Skip Navigation

SINGAPORE, Oct. 10, 2025 /PRNewswire/ -- ADA, the leading independent Data and AI company and Asia's largest integrated digital commerce player, has partnered with Opptra, a global commerce company enabling the expansion of leading consumer brands into Asia. The strategic collaboration has already brought Hasbro, one of the world's most iconic toy and entertainment brands, into Southeast Asia's fast- growing ecommerce market, with many more global powerhouse brands soon to follow, accelerating their digital-first growth across the region.

Continue Reading

The collaboration unites ADA's digital, data, and AI capabilities with Opptra's portfolio of global brands and category expertise. As Southeast Asia's digital economy continues its rapid rise this partnership creates a powerful bridge for international brands to tap into the region's massive ecommerce opportunity.

Through the partnership, ADA will manage and operate flagship marketplace stores for Opptra's global brand portfolio, providing a full suite of ecommerce growth services including digital store operations, AI-powered prediction for scale and efficiency, marketing, creative, and analytics solutions. The collaboration aims to go beyond growing brands' presence across marketplaces, but also to lay the groundwork for direct-to-consumer and omnichannel expansion. Together, ADA and Opptra will onboard and grow leading global brands across key categories including toys, electronics, baby care, and general merchandise.

"Southeast Asia is one of the world's most exciting digital commerce frontiers," said Srinivas Gattamneni, CEO of ADA. "Our partnership with Opptra will bring global brands into the region's digital marketplaces today, and in the long run, transform how they connect, sell, and grow through data, AI, and technology. Together, we're building a foundation for sustained digital growth that extends beyond marketplace into direct-to-consumer, conversational AI, and next-generation customer experiences."

"At Opptra, we've always believed that global brands can win in Asia if they get two things right: understanding each market deeply and executing locally with precision," said Ranjit Babu, CEO at Opptra, Electronics and General Merchandise. "Partnering with ADA helps us do both, and at scale. Together, we can help brands reach millions of young, digital-first consumers across Southeast Asia quickly, efficiently, and with real impact."

The partnership's first milestone, bringing Hasbro into Southeast Asia, marks the beginning of a broader journey. With a strong pipeline of global brands across multiple categories, ADA and Opptra are set to expand their collaboration, deepening their role in shaping the region's digital commerce and transformation landscape.

About ADA

ADA is the data and AI company that designs, builds, and scales trusted AI-powered commerce experiences that drive measurable outcomes, combining AI Identity & Trust, AI-Powered Personalisation & Commerce, and AI-Ready Data Stack Enablement Solutions. Headquartered in Singapore and Malaysia, and operating across 14 markets with a 1,000-strong team serving 1,500 clients across Retail, CPG, BFSI, and more, ADA helps enterprises unlock value from data and transform marketing and commerce with data, AI, and technology.

Learn more: www.adaglobal.com

About Opptra

Opptra is an AI-native franchising and licensing partner dedicated to launching and scaling global brands across Asia. Founded with the backing of Binny Bansal, co-founder of Flipkart, Opptra blends deep domain expertise with advanced technology and a consolidated global supply chain. The company offers end-to-end capabilities including digital brand building, sourcing and manufacturing, and future-ready distribution. With an ecommerce-first approach and omnichannel technology, Opptra empowers brands to penetrate markets swiftly and efficiently.

Learn more: www. opptra.com

SOURCE ADA

--

-- --
